brand_identity.name: Sunya
brand_identity.tagline: Premium dehydrated fruits with zero sugar, zero preservatives. Hand-selected, slow-dehydrated, export-grade quality from Nepal.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-none font-serif text-[#333333]
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight leading-tight font-serif text-[#333333]
hierarchy.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-semibold leading-snug font-serif text-[#333333]
hierarchy.overline: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-sans font-semibold text-[#00A040]

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-24), Asymmetrical Bento Grid for Marketing, Dense Control Room for Dashboard
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and pills

effects.hover_scale: whileHover={{ scale: 1.02 }} transition={{ type: 'spring', stiffness: 400, damping: 10 }}
effects.slide_up: initial={{ y: 30, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}
effects.shimmer_cta: CSS mask-image animation sweeping left to right over the button
effects.float: animate={{ y: [0, -10, 0] }} transition={{ repeat: Infinity, duration: 4, ease: 'easeInOut' }}
effects.pulse: animate={{ scale: [1, 1.05, 1] }} transition={{ repeat: Infinity, duration: 2 }}
effects.glass_reveal: backdrop-blur-xl transitioning in smoothly on scroll

components.header: Sticky with scroll detection. Transparent at top, morphs to backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/80 with border-b border-[#333333]/5 when scrolling.
components.buttons: Primary: #00C950 background, #FFFFFF text, rounded-full, px-8 py-4. Incorporate shimmer animation. Secondary: border border-[#00C950] text-[#00A040] rounded-full.
components.product_card: Clean ivory background. Product image dominates (zoom on hover). Details aligned left. Floating 'Add' button.
components.pricing_selector: Gram-based pills (100g, 200g, 300g, 400g, 500g, 1kg). Highlight bulk savings dynamically below pills. Active state: bg-[#00C950] text-white.
components.chatbot_widget: Bottom-right fixed. Circular launch button with pulse effect. Chat window has glassmorphism, slide-up entrance, and streams AI responses.
components.sunya_care_panel: Personalized nutrition dashboard. Inputs for age/gender/height/weight/health goals. Outputs nutrition rings (protein/carbs/fats/fiber), recommended daily fruit package, and unsafe foods warnings in a Bento Grid layout.
components.admin_dashboard: Sidebar navigation. Dense table layout for orders. High contrast data cards (Archetype 4 utility style).
components.quality_badges: Circular icon badges with text (Zero Sugar, Zero Preservatives, Export Grade) using muted gold (#FFD700) accents.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include data-testid attribute. Convention: kebab-case, role-based. e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a premium Next.js/React e-commerce application.
Use Tailwind CSS for all styling and Framer Motion for the 40+ required animations (shimmer, float, slide-up, etc.).
Ensure the application strictly follows the ivory, deep green, and muted gold palette.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layout, avoiding rigid generic cards. Use Shadcn UI logic for forms, selects, and dialogs.
The product pricing MUST be dynamic based on the selected gram weight (100g to 1kg) with visual indicators for bulk savings.
Build the SUNYA Care panel as a multi-step form leading to an AI-curated nutrition dashboard with circular progress rings (use Recharts or custom SVG).
Include a functional shopping cart drawer and checkout flow.
Do NOT use placeholder image URLs. Only use the verified URLs provided in the media section of this JSON.
Ensure typography matches the Playfair Display (headings) and Outfit (body) pairing via Google Fonts.
